chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-1556 of 2020 Habibullah & others..Vs.. Federation of Pakistan & others. Date Order with signature of Judge BEFORE: Irfan Saadat Khan, Agha Faisal,JJ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7089/2020 (stay) 2. For hearing of Main Case 09.12.2021 Mr. Muhammad Arshad Tanoli, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, D.A.G. ----------------- Irfan Saadat Khan,J. The instant petition was filed with regard to the up-gradation of the post of Religious Teachers presently in BS-11 to BS-16. It is noted that the relevant rules in this regard have not been framed, which is causing impediment in the up-gradation of the said post. It is informed that the matter is now lying with the Pakistan Rangers and Ministry of Interior with regard to formulating rules. It is also brought to our notice that the moment the said rules are framed thereafter the matter would be sent to the Establishment Division, who will approve those rules and thereafter the post would be upgraded. Since the matter is lying with the Pakistan Rangers and Ministry of Interior for quite some time, which is causing impediment in the up-gradation of the post. We, under the circumstances, direct the D.G. Rangers and Secretary Interior to coordinate with each other and frame the rules within one month’s time from the date of receipt of this order. It is clarified that the moment the rules are framed the same would be forwarded to the Establishment Division so that the post may be upgraded without any further delay in accordance with rules. With these directions the instant petition stands disposed of alongwith listed and pending applications, if any.

It is clarified that the moment the rules are framed the same would be forwarded to the Establishment Division so that the post may be upgraded without any further delay in accordance with rules. With these directions the instant petition stands disposed of alongwith listed and pending applications, if any. Let a copy of this order be sent to the Secretary Interior, D.G. Rangers and Secretary Establishment Division for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE SM
